title: Business Analyst
jobDescription:
We are seeking a detailoriented and proactive Business Analyst to support requirements gathering, process documentation, and stakeholder collaboration across multiple teams. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, handson experience in requirement elicitation, and familiarity with PSA/portfolio management tools (preferred, not mandatory).


Your Role


  • Conduct requirement elicitation through interviews, workshops, and stakeholder discussions.
  • Translate business needs into clear user stories, use cases, and acceptance criteria.
  • Analyze complex problems and propose viable solutions aligned with business objectives.
  • Create and maintain Functional Specification Documents (FSDs) and Business Requirements Documents (BRDs).
  • Develop process flows, workflow diagrams, and BPMN models to document current and future state processes.
  • Ensure documentation is accurate, versioncontrolled, and aligned with project goals.
  • Use Jira for backlog management, sprint planning, and requirement tracking.
  • Utilize Excel/Google Sheets for data analysis, reporting, and documentation.
  • Perform basic SQL queries to validate data, support investigations, and interpret dashboards or reports.
  • Familiarity with PSA (Professional Services Automation) or portfolio management tools is a strong plus.

Your profile


  • Strong experience in business analysis, requirements elicitation, and documentation.
  • Handson experience with Jira and Excel/Sheets.
  • Basic SQL knowledge for data validation.
  • Ability to interpret dashboards and derive meaningful insights.
  • Proficiency in creating process flows and BPMN diagrams.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Experience working with crossfunctional teams in agile environments.

title: Business Analyst

ambitionBoxData.Title: Barclays Shared Services Reviews by Employees

jobDescription:
Join us as a Business Analyst at Barclays where you will spearhead the evolution of our infrastructure and deployment pipelines, driving innovation and operational excellence. You will harness cutting-edge technology to build and manage robust, scalable and secure infrastructure, ensuring seamless delivery of our digital solutions.

To be successful as a Business Analyst , you should have experience with:

  • Proven experience in Requirement elicitation (workshops, interviews, shadowing teams). Writing BRDs, FRDs, user stories, process flows, Gap analysis and impact assessment.

  • Strong ability to translate business problems into functional & non-functional requirements. Experience working in Agile / hybrid delivery models.

  • Must have taken multiple problem statements to delivery. Over all 10-12 years of business analysis experience is required. Must have Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Must have strong analytical skills, logical thinking.

  • Experience supporting SIT, UAT, defect triage, go-live readiness, and post-implementation support.

  • Strong analytical skills and logical thinking for managing issues in a high-pressure environment .

  • Experience of working within a System Development Lifecycle (SDLC) and Agile project environment (Agile Central, JIRA, Confluence).

  • Domain & Product Expertise: Excellent understanding of Trade & Working Capital products, workflow, knowledge about customer channels. Good understanding of the corporate banking. Should understand product, processes, system, integrations.

  • Process Optimization & Transformation: Demonstrated experience in process optimization and Process / design mapping, including As-is / To-be process mapping, Identifying bottlenecks, manual touchpoints and automation opportunities. Experience with STP improvement, cycle-time reduction, error reduction initiatives by adopting Customer Centric approach. Business Readiness activities including Target Operating Model, Training support, Operational Impact Assessments . Must possess excellent Visio, Excel. PPT skills.

  • Stakeholder & Delivery Management: Strong stakeholder management skills. Clear communicator with ops, tech teams, and other stakeholders . Ability to manage conflicting priorities and drive consensus. Must be able to work with cross functional teams involving representation of product, operations, developers, testers, PMs, SMs and senior stakeholders.

  • Behavioral & Soft Skills :Ability to work in fast-paced, high-regulatory environments, Clear communicator, Detail-oriented with a process and control mindset.

Some other highly valued skills may include:

  • Data Analytics :Ability to work with data, Root cause analysis, Continuous improvement initiatives. Familiarity with SQL, dashboards or reporting tools is a plus.

  • Platform & Integration Knowledge: API-based integrations, Legacy core banking system interfaces, Vendor system experience .

  • Change & Adoption Management: Experience supporting Change communication , Adoption tracking post rollout etc.

  • AI and ML Understanding : AI Use case Identification and Framing . Covering Data Understanding AI Tooling and Platform Exposure .

  • Exposure to Digital Assets & Emerging Technology: Demonstrated exposure to Digital Assets, including foundational understanding of Blockchain, Tokenisation, Stablecoins, and evolving concepts such as Disintermediation. Working knowledge of asset trading processes, tokenised asset life cycles, and digital settlement models is a plus.

You may be assessed on key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen, strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job-specific technical skills.

The role is based out of Pune.

Purpose of the role

To support the organisation, achieve its strategic objectives by the identification of business requirements and solutions that address business problems and opportunities.

Accountabilities

  • Identification and analysis of business problems and client requirements that require change within the organisation.
  • Development of business requirements that will address business problems and opportunities.
  • Collaboration with stakeholders to ensure that proposed solutions meet their needs and expectations.
  • Support the creation of business cases that justify investment in proposed solutions.
  • Conduct feasibility studies to determine the viability of proposed solutions.
  • Support the creation of reports on project progress to ensure proposed solutions are delivered on time and within budget.
  • Creation of operational design and process design to ensure that proposed solutions are delivered within the agreed scope.
  • Support to change management activities, including development of a traceability matrix to ensure proposed solutions are successfully implemented and embedded in the organisation.

Assistant Vice President Expectations

  • To advise and influence decision making, contribute to policy development and take responsibility for operational effectiveness. Collaborate closely with other functions/ business divisions.
  • Lead a team performing complex tasks, using well developed professional knowledge and skills to deliver on work that impacts the whole business function. Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes
  • If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L Listen and be authentic, E Energise and inspire, A Align across the enterprise, D Develop others.
  • OR for an individual contributor, they will lead collaborative assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.
  • Consult on complex issues; providing advice to People Leaders to support the resolution of escalated issues.
  • Identify ways to mitigate risk and developing new policies/procedures in support of the control and governance agenda.
  • Take ownership for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work done.
  • Perform work that is closely related to that of other areas, which requires understanding of how areas coordinate and contribute to the achievement of the objectives of the organisation sub-function.
  • Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategy.
  • Engage in complex analysis of data from multiple sources of information, internal and external sources such as procedures and practises (in other areas, teams, companies, etc). to solve problems creatively and effectively.
  • Communicate complex information. Complex information could include sensitive information or information that is difficult to communicate because of its content or its audience.
  • Influence or convince stakeholders to achieve outcomes.

All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset to Empower, Challenge and Drive the operating manual for how we behave.
